name: Creamy Brownie Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Light corn syrup or honey
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat together the butter, cocoa, corn syrup, and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar and milk to the mixture, continuing to beat until it reaches a spreading consistency.
3. Use about 1 cup of frosting for filling or decorating your brownies.
